rarity.title: Item Rarity and Tiers
rarity.body:
Items are ranked across four primary quality tiers in V6.0:

1. SCRAP (Rusted/Tattered): -1 Dice Offset, 0.8x stats. Tactical liabilities.
2. STANDARD: The baseline for common gear.
3. EXOTIC (Fine/Masterwork): +1 Dice Offset, 1.2x stats. Often features rare material grammar.
4. UNIQUE: Hand-crafted legendary items with special effects not found in procedural loot.

All items in V6.0 have a Combat Rating (CR) visible via Admin Vision.
